reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, hasta hay personal para poner aire a los neumáticos. Cafetería, baños, todo lo necesario para una parada en un viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, there's even staff to pump up your tires. Cafeteria, restrooms, everything you need for a stopover on a trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbXBXZ2pRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena, tiene de todo. Es un buen lugar para parar en el camino.

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent, and they have everything you need. It's a good place to stop along the way.

reviews.comment:
Siempre limpio, atendido por personal idóneo y servicial. Sanitarios limpios y suficiente espacio para estacionar.

(Translated by Google)
Always clean, staffed by knowledgeable and helpful personnel. Clean restrooms and ample parking.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service, good food, and moderate prices. Rubén brings a lot of character to the place.
